summary:
The document outlines tenant obligations and refurbishment for B‑listed 315–349 Sauchiehall Street. Lease: tenant must repair and maintain the premises (including alterations/additions, boundary elements and fixtures) regardless of cause; redecorate internally and externally every fifth year; no structural alterations without landlord consent.

Works: Repair rear stonework holes, repaint timber fire door, fix cracked concrete step. Rear store: redecorate ceilings/walls, remove redundant services/partitions/fittings, replace flooring/skirting, repair and repaint doors/frames, add lighting. Electrical cupboard: renew suspended ceiling/grid and lights, redecorate. Toilet: redecorate, regrout/replace tiles, renew vinyl, add threshold and lock, service point‑of‑use heater and ventilation. Main store: repair ceilings/walls and large holes, remove shelving/metal panels/counters/raised platforms, replace flooring/skirting; service access hatches; fire alarm panel relocation unlikely. Stairwell/corridor: remove partitions/door, replace nosings/flooring, redecorate, remove CCTV. Stores: repair/redecorate walls/ceilings, replace flooring, clear debris, replace electrical DB cover, fit door. Rear bedroom: redecorate, repair walls, remove tiles/whiteboards; fire door non‑compliant.
